name: clankers-email
description: Send and read emails via Fastmail JMAP — no third-party services needed

tool_definitions.name: send_email
tool_definitions.description: Send an email via Fastmail JMAP. Requires FASTMAIL_API_TOKEN env var. Recipients are restricted to addresses matching CLANKERS_EMAIL_ALLOWED_RECIPIENTS (comma-separated emails or @domain patterns). Returns confirmation or error.

from.description: Sender address (defaults to CLANKERS_EMAIL_FROM env var)

html.description: If true, body is treated as HTML (default: false)

tool_definitions.name: search_email
tool_definitions.description: Search emails via Fastmail JMAP. All filter parameters are optional and AND-combined. Returns a paginated list of messages with id, from, to, subject, date, and preview snippet. Use read_email with a message ID to get the full content.

after.description: Messages received after this date (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601)

before.description: Messages received before this date (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601)

tool_definitions.name: read_email
tool_definitions.description: Read a single email by ID. Returns full headers (from, to, cc, subject, date), body text (plain text preferred, HTML stripped as fallback), and attachment metadata. Get message IDs from search_email results.

tool_definitions.name: list_mailboxes
tool_definitions.description: List Fastmail mailboxes (folders) for the account. Useful for verifying config works.
